name: BizPilot Tools
description: Product search, lead capture, and escalation tools for BizPilot SMB agents.

supabaseKey.description: Supabase service-role key (bypasses RLS, tool enforces tenant isolation)

adminNotifyChannel.description: Channel to notify admin on escalation/lead (e.g. 'telegram'). Falls back to env BIZPILOT_ADMIN_NOTIFY_CHANNEL.

adminNotifyTarget.description: Admin's user ID on the notify channel (e.g. Telegram chat ID). Falls back to env BIZPILOT_ADMIN_NOTIFY_TARGET.
